data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Read-first gate complete. Created eval suite at plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml with 6 test cases: (1) naive grep vs structured YAML parsing, (2) 2-dimension rationale coverage, (3) golden hammer anti-pattern detection (Redis for in-process cache), (4) premature abstraction anti-pattern (plugin registry for single use case), (5) counter-proposal mode when all proposals fail criteria, (6) epic criterion disqualification (atomic write enforcement). ✓
